name: Marathon Petroleum Corporation
description: Marathon Petroleum Corporation (MPC) is a leading, integrated, downstream and midstream energy company headquartered in Findlay, Ohio. The company operates the nation's largest refining system, processing crude oil and other feedstocks into transportation fuels, asphalt, and specialty products. Beyond its extensive refining capabilities, Marathon Petroleum is involved in the marketing and retail of petroleum products, as well as midstream operations, which include the transportation and storage of energy products. Through its integrated business model, the company plays a critical role in the energy infrastructure of the United States, providing essential fuel and energy solutions to consumers and industries nationwide.
